perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a beige dress and brown bucket hat stands in a Costco aisle holding a box of Pistachio Mini Chiffon Cakes, pointing at them with an excited expression. (2) Close-ups of the cakes inside the box are shown as she gestures with her fist to compare the size of a single cake. (3) The scene shifts to her home environment where she is sitting at a white marble table wearing a pink beret, holding one of the cakes toward the camera. (4) A close-up shot shows her cutting into the cake with a pink plastic knife to reveal a green pistachio cream center. (5) She continues to gesture and talk enthusiastically while holding the cake, ending with a presentation of the cake toward the lens.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop music begins. A high-pitched, excited female voice speaks in Mandarin, introducing a new Costco find. Faint ambient noise of a busy store can be heard. (2) The vocal continues at a fast pace, describing the price and physical characteristics of the product. (3) The soundscape transitions as the ambient noise shifts to a quieter indoor room setting, though the BGM remains constant. (4) A soft cutting sound is heard as the knife slices through the cake. (5) The speaker concludes with a final recommendation, maintaining a friendly and enthusiastic tone until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and '開心果迷你戚風蛋糕' (Pistachio Mini Chiffon Cake). Hook Text: '好吃嗎!' (Is it delicious?) and '只要50元!' (Only 50 NTD!). (2) Subtitles tracking speech: '開心 它做的好漂亮哦' (Happy, it's made so beautifully) and '跟拳頭一樣大!' (As big as a fist!). (3) '299有6個 所以一個是50塊' (299 for 6, so one is 50). (4) '這一款 你一定要買' (You must buy this one) and '空氣感十足' (Full of airiness). (5) Decorative Text: '推薦' (Recommend) at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Store Intro -> Size Comparison -> Home Tasting -> Detailed Texture Demo -> Final Verdict

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; no other distinct people visible in the shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a beige sleeveless top/dress and bucket hat in store, and a pink beret at home.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First half features Costco warehouse shelves and refrigerated cases; second half is a clean home interior with a marble table and a sofa in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor lighting, consistent and clear.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Intro -> Benefit Analysis -> CTA/Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping guide and food review intended to influence viewers to purchase a specific new dessert at Costco by highlighting its low price and high quality through visual proof and enthusiastic endorsement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed positive review of a specific retailer's product with pricing information.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy 'kawaii' presentation style, frequent use of colorful variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical of Taiwanese 'Short Video' food reviews, emphasizing value for money ('C/P value') and visual appeal.
